scenarios.description: outputSettings() returns the default OutputSettings instance after Document creation
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("http://example.com"); // default constructor
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the same instance as doc.outputSettings; default charset is UTF-8 and syntax is html

scenarios.description: outputSettings() returns the updated OutputSettings instance after setter call
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("http://example.com"); // default constructor; newSettings mutated before set
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the same instance as the one passed to doc.outputSettings(newSettings)
